calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-14-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Marceyl Jer Monte Grecia Benford was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of Minor to: Marceyl Jer Monte Grecia Benford-Jones.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
